# LifeCare Health

> LifeCare Health is a multi-speciality hospital offering expert medical
> care across cardiology, neurology, orthopaedics, paediatrics and more,
> combining modern facilities with a patient-first approach.

LifeCare Health operates 12 medical departments staffed by 120+ doctors,
treats 25,000+ patients, and provides 24/7 emergency care. The hospital is
accredited by NABH (National Accreditation Board for Hospitals) and is
empanelled with major insurance providers in India.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://life-care-health.netlify.app/index.html): Overview of LifeCare Health, key statistics and highlights.
- [About](https://life-care-health.netlify.app/about.html): Hospital story, mission, vision and core values.
- [Departments](https://life-care-health.netlify.app/departments.html): Full list of medical departments and services offered.
- [Doctors](https://life-care-health.netlify.app/doctors.html): Profiles of senior consultants and specialists.
- [Packages & Treatments](https://life-care-health.netlify.app/packages.html): Health check-up packages and department-wise treatment/procedure cost estimates.
- [Treatment Packages](https://life-care-health.netlify.app/packages.html): Transparent pricing for common treatment packages.
- [Gallery](https://life-care-health.netlify.app/gallery.html): Photos of facilities, equipment, team and events.
- [Appointment](https://life-care-health.netlify.app/appointment.html): Online appointment booking form and FAQs.
- [Contact](https://life-care-health.netlify.app/contact.html): Address, phone numbers, OPD hours and emergency helpline.

## Contact

- Emergency helpline: 1800-100-200 (24/7)
- General enquiries: +91-1132642125
- Email: info@lifecarehealth.com
